      GetBatchStatusResponse WebhooksEvent.getDirectBatch() 
      GetBatchStatusResponse GetBatchStatusResponse.withItemCount(Integer value)
      The total number of items included in the batch submission.
      GetBatchStatusResponse GetBatchStatusResponse.withMerchantBatchReference(String value)
      Unique batch reference submitted by the merchant.
      GetBatchStatusResponse GetBatchStatusResponse.withOperationType(String value)
      The specific operation type being requested for the batch.

      The status of the batch.
